---
title: "Bayesian Methods"
description: "Conjugate priors, MCMC, Stan, hierarchical models, Bayesian computation."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
60 TUTORIALS
:::

# Bayesian Methods

Conjugate priors, MCMC, Stan, hierarchical models, Bayesian computation.
